message:
feat(python): add 20 missing MultiDiGraph methods + view types

Add nodes, edges, degree, in_degree, out_degree, adj, succ, pred,
adjacency, copy, subgraph, edge_subgraph, to_directed, to_undirected,
reverse, add_weighted_edges_from, remove_edges_from, update,
number_of_edges_between, get_edge_data to PyMultiDiGraph.

Add MultiDiGraphNodeView, MultiDiGraphEdgeView, MultiDiGraphDegreeView
(supports Total/In/Out degree kinds).

Add MultiDiGraph degree/in_degree/out_degree methods to Rust fnx-classes.

br-8k4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
